markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, ongoing experiments, and prioritize this week's work.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** A sharp traffic drop occurred last weekend (Fri-Sat), reversing a positive week-on-week trend. The "Netflix cost" page, a recent rewrite, was a major driver of this decline.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Experiments:** Adding screenshots to alternatives pages boosted impressions for *already-indexed* pages but failed to get new pages indexed. This reinforces that internal linking is the primary driver for indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The content publishing queue is broken, reverting to "stage one" and preventing new content from going live. This is the team's top priority to fix.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [**Priorities:** To focus efforts, the team will prioritize publishing Pricing and Answer pages. Reviews pages, which lack clear performance signals, will be deprioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Traffic Dip:** Impressions and clicks fell sharply last weekend (Fri-Sat), reversing a positive week-on-week trend.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Affected Content:** The "Netflix cost" page, a recent rewrite by Kavishka, was a significant contributor to the decline.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**New Reporting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [**Monday:** Weekly review comparing the previous Sunday-Saturday period to the week before.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [**Mid-week:** Check-in on daily performance.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

### Indexing & Quality Experiments

  - [**Alternatives Page Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Action:** Added screenshots and rich content to alternatives pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Result:** Boosted impressions for pages already indexed; did not help get new pages indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Conclusion:** Internal linking remains the key driver for indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Brand Page "How It Works" Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Action:** Added "How It Works" sections to \~15 brand pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Status:** Too early for results.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Brand Page Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [**Problem:** Brand pages are too broad and may cannibalize traffic from dedicated Pricing and Reviews pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The "Overview" tab should be concise and focus on the brand itself, with sub-pages handling specific topics.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will create a thread to discuss optimizing brand page titles.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [**Answer Page Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)
      - [**Action:** Publish a large batch of new answer pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)
      - [**Rationale:** With only 35 indexed answer pages, the goal is to increase volume to gather more data on their indexing and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)

### Blockers & Priorities

  - [**Critical Blocker: Publishing Queue Failure**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
      - [**Issue:** The content publishing queue is broken, reverting to "stage one" (content brief) and preventing new content from going live.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
      - [**Impact:** Halts all new content publication.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will escalate the Linear ticket for immediate resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
      - [**High Priority:** Publish Pricing and Answer pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
      - [**Deprioritize:** Reviews pages, which lack clear performance signals.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
  - [**Engineering Tickets:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Jason will push the team's SEO/Quality tickets to the product team after Daniel's platform retooling (Output) is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Action:** Saskia and Kavishka will tag their Linear tickets with `Indexing` or `Quality` to help Jason prioritize.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)

### Linking Strategy

  - [**Noble Platform:** Jason is testing Noble, a service that finds backlink opportunities by identifying sites that cite sources used in our AI prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
      - [**Status:** No results yet; Jason will invite the team to the Noble channel.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** The goal is a "web of internal links" where pages link to each other as relevantly as possible to improve indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2856.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)

      - [Push SEO/Quality tickets to the product team.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Create a thread to discuss brand page title optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Invite Saskia and Kavishka to the Noble channel.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [**Saskia & Kavishka:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
      - [Tag all relevant Linear tickets with `Indexing` or `Quality`.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
      - [Prioritize publishing Pricing and Answer pages.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
      - [Update the alternatives page ticket with the experiment's outcome.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**Saskia:**](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Link the "How It Works" experiment document in the meeting notes.](https://fathom.video/share/rsZer6k-VPy4rmX2gW3uKpxqJiVMxbTU?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
